allow: PowerShell("" | & node dist/index.js 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Mode:|tool|running" | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Output "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(npm run build; npm test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Test Files|Tests " | Select-Object -Last 2; "" | & node dist/index.js 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Mode:|stdio"; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($config = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json" -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($config\) { $config } else { "config file not found at $env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json" })

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const todo=fs.readFileSync\('todo.md','utf8'\);const handoff=fs.readFileSync\('HANDOFF.md','utf8'\);console.log\('todo #49 line:'\);console.log\(todo.split\('\\n'\).filter\(l=>l.includes\('**49.**'\)\)[0].slice\(0,180\)+'...'\);console.log\('\\nHANDOFF sections:'\);for\(const l of handoff.split\('\\n'\)\){if\(l.startsWith\('## '\)\) console.log\('  '+l\);}console.log\('\\nHANDOFF length:',handoff.length,'chars'\);")

PowerShell($config = "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json"; if \(Test-Path $config\) { Get-Content $config -Raw | Select-String -Pattern 'command|node\\.exe|nvm4w' -AllMatches } else { "Config not present" })
PowerShell($config = "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json"; if \(Test-Path $config\) { Get-Content $config | Select-String -Pattern 'command' } else { "NO CONFIG" })
PowerShell(npx vitest run tests/statement-of-cash-flows.test.ts tests/builder-emit-order.test.ts 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15; "EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($req = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}'; $out = "$req`n" | & "C:\\nvm4w\\nodejs\\node.exe" dist/index.js 2>&1; if \($out -match 'qb_statement_of_cash_flows'\) { "TOOL REGISTERED OK" } else { "TOOL NOT FOUND IN tools/list response" }; $out.Length)

PowerShell($logDir = Join-Path $env:TEMP "qbxml-banner-smoke"; if \(Test-Path $logDir\) { Remove-Item $logDir -Recurse -Force }; $env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML = "1"; $env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH = $logDir; $out = "" | & node dist/index.js 2>&1; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Remove-Item Env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML; Remove-Item Env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH; $out; "EXIT: $ec")

PowerShell($logDir = Join-Path $env:TEMP "qbxml-banner-smoke2"; if \(Test-Path $logDir\) { Remove-Item $logDir -Recurse -Force }; $env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML = "1"; $env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH = $logDir; $out = "" | & node dist/index.js 2>&1; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Remove-Item Env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML; Remove-Item Env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH; $out; "EXIT: $ec")

PowerShell($env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML=$null; $env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH=$null; $output = "" | & node dist/index.js 2>&1; $exit = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Output "---EXITCODE---$exit"; Write-Output "---BANNER---"; Write-Output $output)

PowerShell($env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML="1"; $env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH="$env:TEMP\\qbxml-smoke"; $output = "" | & node dist/index.js 2>&1; $exit = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Output "---EXITCODE---$exit"; Write-Output "---BANNER---"; Write-Output $output; Remove-Item env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML, env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH)

PowerShell($env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML="1"; $env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH="$env:TEMP\\qbxml-smoke"; $banner = "" | & node "c:\\Users\\VR\\Projects\\Quickbooks MCP Desktop\\dist\\index.js" 2>&1; $exit = $LASTEXITCODE; "EXIT=$exit"; $banner; Remove-Item env:QB_DEBUG_QBXML, env:QB_DEBUG_LOG_PATH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
